content.en:
"Blood Ancestor, let's meet again!"

Ye Tian greeted.

"Yes, we met again, I didn't expect you to break through to a high-level immeasurable lifeform so quickly. According to the agreement, you should release me!" said the Blood Ancestor with a little excitement.

He's been sealed away for so long that he can't wait to come out.

Before, he could hardly see hope, but now that he is about to come out, he is naturally very excited.

"Blood Ancestor, tell me the nodes of this seal one by one, I will destroy these nodes, and the rest is up to you!" Ye Tian said.

"Good!" the Blood Ancestor nodded.

Immediately, the Blood Ancestor told Ye Tian about the nodes of this seal.

After Ye Tian learned about these nodes, he began to cut off Black Mountain to destroy these nodes.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian kept making moves, breaking one truncation after another, which caused the truncated black mountain to continue to shake and collapse.

This scene directly alarmed those who had cut off the forbidden area to the enhanced object level, and the soul elder, Akagi and others came out one by one.

They were originally very annoyed, after all, once the Truncated Black Mountain collapsed, it would affect the Truncated Forbidden Zone.

At that time, the cut off zone will also collapse, blend into the silent Black Sea, and their advantage will not exist.

But when they saw that it was Ye Tian who was destroying and cutting off Black Mountain, they suddenly didn't dare to get angry.

The soul elder said respectfully: "Lord Endless Dao Ancestor, this one who has cut off the seal of the Black Mountain is a certain high-level immeasurable life form, if it is destroyed and cut off the Black Mountain, I am afraid that one will come out!"

"I know, you don't need to worry about this!"

Ye Tian said.

When the soul elders saw this, they didn't dare to say anything.

Soon, they began to transfer their race, after all, once the forbidden area collapsed, they had to find a way to find a new territory to settle their people.

And the other Dao Ancestors of the Nine-Story Building also knew about the situation of cutting off the Black Mountain, but they knew that Ye Tian did it, so they didn't ask, they just came over to watch.

Thundered!!!

As one node after another was destroyed, the truncated Black Mountain finally collapsed into sections.

......

Seal the plane.

The blood sensed that the nodes of the seal were broken one by one, and the chains of the seal that bound him became loose, and the power was greatly reduced.

Not only that, but this sealed plane also began to crumble, and it couldn't trap him.

Immediately, the blood mobilized the power of the whole body to shake this time and space.

"Break it for me!"

The power of the blood burst out, and he directly broke free from the chains.

And this sealed time and space was also torn apart by him.

In an instant, the blood rushed out of the sealed time and space and came to the outside world.

"I'm finally out of trouble!"

Vicious Blood was extremely excited.

He didn't know how many years he had been sealed, it was too long, and even if he kept sleeping, he had woken up countless times.

At this time, he saw a large number of Dao Ancestors around him, and the blood-devouring instinct in his heart was generated.

Immediately, he took a big mouth, and a suction force came, directly sucking the Dao Ancestors around him.

In front of him, those so-called Dao Ancestors did not have the slightest power to resist,

"Not good!"

Soul Elder and Dongchen Dao Ancestor's faces changed.

They had all broken through to the realm of middle-level immeasurable lifeforms, but they didn't expect that in the face of this high-level immeasurable lifeform that had been sealed for countless years, they didn't have the slightest power to resist.

How terrifying this high-level immeasurable lifeform is!

"Endless Dao Ancestor!"

Dongchen Daozu shouted Ye Tian.

And Ye Tian also made the first move.

Airplanes!

A golden spear stabbed directly into the blood, interrupting the blood's movements.

"Little one, you're going to stop me?"

Vicious Blood said with some annoyance.

"Blood, I released you, but I didn't let you eat the Dao Ancestor of the Silent Black Sea!" Ye Tian said coldly.

Vicious Blood sneered: "It's just a group of ants, what's the problem with eating it, I used to eat some Dao Ancestors or even Great Ancestors when I was hungry." If you provoke me, even you will eat you!"

"No wonder you're sealed!"

Ye Tian understood that the raccoon blood must have angered a certain existence far beyond the raccoon blood, so he casually sealed it away.

"Little one, don't mess with me, get out of the way!"

Vicious said coldly.

Ye Tian released him, and he didn't want to kill Ye Tian, so as long as Ye Tian didn't stop him, he wouldn't make a move on Ye Tian.

However.

It was impossible for Ye Tian to sit idly by.

In an instant, Ye Tian made a move.

Rumble!!!

The infinite body of the consummation realm is urged, and then the immeasurable extreme domain technique is used - amputated fingers!

The terrifying finger made the bloody face change.

I saw a blood-colored armor appear on the body of the raccoon blood, which was the transformation of an immeasurable extreme control technique, and it had extremely powerful defensive power.

However, under Ye Tian's finger, the blood-colored armor was directly cracked.

And the bloody body also flew upside down, and the body continued to crack, and the blood was scattered into the void.

However, Ye Tian knew very well that there was nothing big about the blood.

"The blood is so powerful!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

You must know that the raccoon blood has been sealed for countless years, and now it must be in a weak state, and it may even be damaged by the foundation, but even so, it can still catch his amputated finger, this is not an ordinary high-level immeasurable life form.

Its peak combat power is afraid that it has surpassed the Void Whale Overlord!

And at this moment, what is even more shocking is the blood.

He had seen a lot, so he could judge a lot of things from Ye Tian's finger in an instant.

"Your superior immeasurable body has cultivated to the consummation realm! Moreover, you have also comprehended an immeasurable extreme domain technique, this immeasurable extreme domain technique is somewhat similar to that existence, it should be that person's inheritance has been obtained by you, and you have also practiced it! Moreover, you have definitely completed more than ten life recasting in the intermediate immeasurable life body realm!"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded slightly.

"Wicked!" exclaimed Blood.

Immediately, he immediately said again: "Okay, I won't eat these Dao Ancestors, we don't need to fight, you can't kill me." No matter how weak I am, it is still a high-level immeasurable lifeform that has condensed immeasurable blood, you are only in the first stage of a high-level immeasurable lifeform, and it will be very early to kill me!"

"Immeasurable blood?"

Ye Tian was puzzled, what is this.

Seeing that Ye Tian didn't know anything about immeasurable blood, he couldn't help but be curious: "You don't even know immeasurable blood?"

"I don't know!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Vicious Blood smiled and said: "I thought you had a big background to be able to break through to a high-level immeasurable lifeform in such a short time, but I didn't expect you to even know immeasurable blood, it seems that you have obtained some opportunities to break through so quickly!"

"Can you tell me about the division of the realm of higher-order immeasurable lifeforms?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" Vicky nodded, "It's not a big secret. But you can't trouble me in the future!"

"As long as you don't eat the creatures of the Silent Black Sea, I won't trouble you!" Ye Tian promised.

"That's no problem, your creatures in the Silent Black Sea are too weak, otherwise I wouldn't even bother to eat if I just broke through the seal!"

Immediately, Ye Tian asked the other Dao Ancestors to leave, and Ye Tian and the Blood Ancestor came to a secluded place to chat.
